info.name: Cyberlisans API
info.description: Cyberlisans backend API integration tests. Covers auth, sellers, escrow, payouts, disputes, admin, health, and debug endpoints. Run against local or production environment via Newman for CI smoke tests.

exec: pm.test('Has id, email, role', function () { pm.expect(json.id).to.exist; pm.expect(json.email).to.exist; pm.expect(json.role).to.exist; });
pm.test('Has seller id or error info', function () { pm.expect(json).to.satisfy(function(b){ return b.id || b.code; }); });

exec: pm.test('Body has expected keys', function () { pm.expect(json).to.satisfy(function(b){ return b.id || b.code === 'NOT_FOUND'; }); });
pm.test('Has slug or error code', function () { pm.expect(json).to.satisfy(function(b){ return b.slug || b.code; }); });

pm.test('Body is an array, items, data, or has 403 code', function () { pm.expect(json).to.satisfy(function(b){ return Array.isArray(b) || (b.items && Array.isArray(b.items)) || b.data || b.code === '2FA_REQUIRED'; }); });
pm.test('Body has id or error code', function () { pm.expect(json).to.satisfy(function(b){ return b.id || b.code || (b.error && b.error.code); }); });
pm.test('Body has id or error code', function () { pm.expect(json).to.satisfy(function(b){ return b.id || b.code || (b.error && b.error.code); }); });
pm.test('Body has ok or error code', function () { pm.expect(json).to.satisfy(function(b){ return b.ok !== undefined || b.id || b.code; }); });
pm.test('Body has id or error code', function () { pm.expect(json).to.satisfy(function(b){ return b.id || b.code || (b.error && b.error.code); }); });

pm.test('Body has items or is array, or NOT_FOUND code', function () { pm.expect(json).to.satisfy(function(b){ return Array.isArray(b) || (b.items && Array.isArray(b.items)) || b.code === 'NOT_FOUND'; }); });
pm.test('Body has id or error code', function () { pm.expect(json).to.satisfy(function(b){ return b.id || b.code || (b.error && b.error.code); }); });
pm.test('Body has items or error code', function () { pm.expect(json).to.satisfy(function(b){ return Array.isArray(b) || (b.items && Array.isArray(b.items)) || b.code; }); });
pm.test('Body has id or error code', function () { pm.expect(json).to.satisfy(function(b){ return b.id || b.code || (b.error && b.error.code); }); });
pm.test('Body has items, data, or error code', function () { pm.expect(json).to.satisfy(function(b){ return Array.isArray(b) || (b.items && Array.isArray(b.items)) || b.data || b.code; }); });
pm.test('Body has ok or error key', function () { pm.expect(json).to.satisfy(function(b){ return b.ok !== undefined || b.error || b.code; }); });
pm.test('No unexpected 5xx except rpc errors', function () { pm.expect([200,403,404,500]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('Body has items, data, or error code', function () { pm.expect(json).to.satisfy(function(b){ return Array.isArray(b) || (b.items && Array.isArray(b.items)) || b.data || b.code; }); });
pm.test('Body has ok or error', function () { pm.expect(json).to.satisfy(function(b){ return b.ok !== undefined || b.error !== undefined || b.code !== undefined; }); });
pm.test('No unexpected 5xx except DB errors', function () { pm.expect([200,500]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
